headlines.title: Supreme Court temporarily extends access to abortion pill while it mulls legal challenge
headlines.description: The justices are still considering what next steps to take in a case that could block availability of the abortion pill mifepristone by mail.

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: Some 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: James Comey says seashells case illustrates Trump’s ‘bottomless desire’ for revenge
headlines.description: Former FBI Director James Comey said the Trump administration’s pursuit of another indictment against him — this time over an Instagram photo of seashells — reflects the president’s fixation on going after his critics.

headlines.title: Supreme Court lets Alabama speed up adoption of congressional map eliminating a majority-Black district
headlines.description: The decision sends litigation back to a lower court as the state races to adopt a congressional map that would eliminate a majority-Black district and more heavily favor Republicans.

headlines.title: President Trump looks to suspend the federal gas tax
headlines.description: Amid a global energy crisis, President Trump says he will suspend the federal gas tax, a move that would require an act of Congress, as more Americans are feeling the pain at the pump. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports.

headlines.title: Tom Llamas in China ahead of Trump’s historic trip
headlines.description: The historic summit is just days away, when President Trump will go face-to-face with China’s President Xi. Tom Llamas is on the ground in Beijing where he’ll be giving us an inside look at the talks and at what China’s doing to try and win the race for economic dominance.

headlines.title: Supreme Court temporarily extends full access to abortion pill by mail
headlines.description: The Supreme Court temporarily allowed full access to the abortion pill mifepristone while it considers a case that could limit availability of the drug. The court had earlier provisionally blocked a lower court decision that would have prevented the pill from being administered by mail.

headlines.title: 'Ohio is back': Both parties navigate competitive midterm races in a forgotten battleground
headlines.description: Two hard facts hover over this year’s midterm races in Ohio.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Trump says he would support suspending the federal gas tax
headlines.description: Suspending the federal gas tax would require congressional approval, and it could cost the government billions of dollars in revenue.

headlines.title: Democrats try to corner Republicans on $1 billion proposal for Trump’s ballroom: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: Welcome to From the Politics Desk, a daily newsletter that brings you the NBC News Politics team’s latest reporting and analysis from the White House, Capitol Hill and the campaign trail

headlines.title: Advocacy group sues Trump administration over effort to paint reflecting pool ‘American Flag Blue’
headlines.description: The Cultural Landscape Foundation seeks to block the ongoing repainting of the reflecting pool on the National Mall that Trump said will be “American Flag Blue.”
